name: Hero Pumps — General
subject: Circulator pump supplier from China
body:
Hi {contact_name},

{company_name} looks like a solid player in the {country} building products space. I work with Hero Pump — we make variable frequency circulator pumps at our factory in Zhejiang.

ErP compliant (EEI ≤ 0.23), TÜV certified. Most of our European clients switched from European brands and saved 30-40% on unit cost.

Open to a quick catalog and price list? No commitment — just for your reference.
